data.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُ اللَّهُ رَبِّي لاَ أُشْرِكُ بِهِ شَيْئاً)).
data.english_text: (Allah, Allah is my Lord, I do not associate anything with Him.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (None has the right to be worshipped except You.  How perfect You are, verily I was among the wrong-doers.)
